out_of_scope.title: Out of scope
out_of_scope.body: Based on your answers, the EU AI Act does not apply to your situation, or your system is not considered an AI system within the meaning of Article 3(1).

become_provider.title: You become a provider
become_provider.body: Because you substantially modify an AI system, you are considered a provider under Article 25(1)(b) and must comply with provider obligations rather than your original operator role.

handover.title: Handover to new provider
handover.body: As a provider who has substantially modified a high-risk AI system, you must hand over documentation and information to the new provider so they can comply with their obligations under Article 25(2).

high_risk.title: High-risk AI system
high_risk.body: Your AI system is classified as high-risk under Article 6. Additional obligations under Title III, Chapter 2 apply before placing the system on the market or putting it into service.

high_risk_exception.title: High-risk exception for deployers
high_risk_exception.body: As a deployer operating in the EU, certain high-risk classification pathways (Annex III use cases) may not impose full provider obligations on you, but deployer obligations under Chapter 3, Section 4 still apply.

prohibited.title: Prohibited AI practice
prohibited.body: Your AI system appears to fall within a prohibited practice under Article 5. Such systems must not be placed on the market, put into service, or used in the Union.

gpai.title: General-purpose AI model
gpai.body: Your system is a general-purpose AI model subject to Chapter V obligations in addition to any system-level requirements.

transparency_only.title: Limited risk — transparency obligations
transparency_only.body: Your AI system is not high-risk but is subject to transparency obligations under Article 50.
